productName: DBG Infused Pre-roll Monkey Pie x Smooth Fruity - 0.5g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Monkey Pie x Smooth Fruity, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a sweet mixed fruit flavor, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
